text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
You should use it. It's perfect for when you need a
break.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
No! You should use it instead! It'll be great for a
change of pace!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I don't require it. Besides, it's not appropriate for
a trainer to accept this from their—

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Oh, perfect timing. Don't ask any questions—just
take this!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: W-wait! Bitter Glasse!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What she so forcefully gives us is a coupon to
visit a tourist farm.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
She apparently got it while out shopping. I told
her that I didn't need it, but she wouldn't relent...
choice_data_list: Well, I'm free now. What do you say?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: What? You mean... go together?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Hm, I suppose we shouldn't let it go to waste.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
This is nice. The view is beautiful around here,
and the air is crisp and refreshing.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
The grounds are so large that simply walking
around feels like it would be excellent training.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, if only Bitter Glasse hadn't been so
stubborn. This would've been the perfect place
for her to relax.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Yet she kept insisting that I get a change of
pace...
choice_data_list:
Maybe she was worried you're overworking
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: If that's true, it's a shortcoming on my part.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I have been rather busy lately.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Bitter Glasse is unexpectedly intuitive, despite
how she may seem.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I need to improve my stamina so this doesn't
happen aga—

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Wait. Could it be you invited me for precisely the
same reason?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: ...I see. Then I'll leave it at that.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Let's go for a stroll. Walking with purpose makes
for good exercise.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what a strange creature. It's staring right at
me...
choice_data_list: Do you know what it's called?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Are you making fun of me? Of course I know what
it's called. It's... an alcapa, obviously.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Ahem! I knew that. I was just testing you.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Is it really safe to be touching that cow?! What if
it snaps at you?
choice_data_list: It won't bite. Wanna try petting it?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
V-very well. I'm grateful for everything that cows
provide us, after all...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Their milk is an important source of nutrients for
runners, and—

text_block_list.name: Cow
text_block_list.text: Mooooo.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Eek!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We enjoy our day together, slowly strolling
around the farm and interacting with all the
animals we meet.
